backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a task management system with CRUD operations for tasks, status tracking, attempt counting, and archival functionality using Map-based storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three implemented features: task submission interface, task dashboard with real-time status, and botanical-themed visual design with associated files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing components, pages, hooks, and styling with botanical theme implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes using OKLCH color format with botanical color palette variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Flower application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with dashboard and submit routes, wrapped in ThemeProvider with Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero banner component with gradient background, AI-powered task automation messaging, and call-to-action buttons using botanical theme colors.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout wrapper providing navigation header, main content outlet, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution and UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive navigation header with logo, desktop menu, mobile sheet drawer, and active route highlighting using botanical theme colors.
frontend/src/components/TaskCard.tsx: Displays a task card with status badge, priority, attempt count, and collapsible result section. Supports click handlers and hover effects with status-specific icons and colors.
Modal dialog showing detailed task information including status, priority, attempt count, and assigned user. Includes a refresh button to update task status using the useRefreshTask hook.
frontend/src/components/TaskList.tsx: Displays a filterable and tabbed list of tasks organized by status (all, pending, in progress, completed, failed) and task type. Opens TaskDetailModal when a task card is clicked.
frontend/src/components/TaskSubmissionFo: Form component for creating new tasks with task type selection and description textarea. Validates input, calls useCreateTask mutation, and navigates to home on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state. Invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality using @dfinity/auth-client. Manages authentication state and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for task operations: fetching all tasks (with 3s polling), fetching individual tasks, creating tasks, and refreshing task data. All hooks depend on the useActor hook for backend communication.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom botanical color palettes (flower green, botanical purple, earth warm) and design tokens for light/dark themes using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that sets up QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page displaying task statistics (total, pending, in-progress, completed, failed) with visual cards and a TaskList component, calculating completion rates from task data.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitTaskPage.tsx: Task submission page with a form for creating new tasks, back navigation, and tips section for users to write better task descriptions.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the theme with custom color variables (botanical palettes, semantic UI colors) using OKLCH format, container settings, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking the Flower AI application state, including existing features (task submission, dashboard, botanical UI theme), pending feature requests (AI automation, instruction processing, performance optimization), and architectural notes.
